name: Mulligan's Boxty Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and onions and process together to a coarse puree. Do not overprocess; the texture should be slightly rough.
2. Add 2 beaten eggs, salt, and pepper to taste. Gradually add self-raising flour until the mixture forms a batter with a thick pouring consistency.
3. Heat a hotplate or large frying pan with a little oil. Pour in a ladleful of batter on one side of the pan and another on the opposite side (you may need to cook only two pancakes at a time).
4. Cook on medium heat until the pancakes are golden brown underneath, then carefully turn them over and cook the other side.
5. Serve with apple sauce made by stewing sliced Granny Smith apples with water, sugar, and lemon juice until a soft puree is formed.
(Note: The attribution line has been removed.)
